programmes.show_description: First-hand accounts of disasters at sea, including a liner crashing into a pier, animal attacks, lightning strikes, and a ship veering towards the path of a tornado.

Ross seeks medical help when he finds a mysterious skin condition on his backside. Phoebe struggles to choose between two guys. Monica thinks Pete is about to propose.

programmes.show_name: Secret Spitfires: How Britain Won the War
programmes.show_description: The secret history of how - after the Luftwaffe bombed the main manufacturing site of Spitfire aircraft - it was decided these planes would be built in hidden locations.

A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Paddington wins a raffle and a meal for two at Sofia's cafe, but must choose a best friend to go with him, either Jonathan, Judy, Mateo, or Mr Gruber. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: It's almost Christmas and the elves are busy making toys. When there is a problem with the toys, a little bit of magic is needed to save the day. (VS)
Pen Pal: Peppa has a new pen pal, a little donkey from France, named Delphine.
Granny and Grandpa's Attic. Peppa and George are helping Granny and Grandpa Pig tidy their attic, but they have trouble deciding what to throw out.
Tweedy and Fluff find a slide! Tweedy discovers that Fluff likes to go up rather than down until a bit of help and a lot of patience finally puts Fluff at the top. Will he give it a go?
From magic shows to treasure hunts, the gang celebrates friendship and teamwork in a nature-inspired environment. In this show, Squiggle can't find Fluff while playing hide and seek.
...Big Adventures! Raul the Brazilian tank engine wants to beat Thomas in a game but his super-competitive nature gets him into trouble.
On a wildlife sketching trip, Norman wants to find the most spectacular creature to sketch, but this gets a bit tricky when Lily Chen tags along.
The Quarrel: Peppa and Suzy Sheep are best friends. But one day they have a quarrel and decide they are not best friends anymore. Will they ever say sorry?
Paddington learns about bees and decides to help them make honey by planting a flower garden but someone thinks they're weeds!
In the park, the friends try to catch autumn leaves as they begin to fall. Posy gets frustrated when she's unable to grab any.
Travelling Travis's balloon gets caught on Cap'n Turbot's boat, the Flounder, and Travis and Cap'n Turbot wind up on a wayward airborne cruise all the way out into the desert.
A new farmer in town asks Rubble & Crew to build a barn for her pig! But will it be done in time for the big Pig Party?
With a new baby on the way, Mummy and Daddy Pig realise they have run out of space at home! They decide to make their own home bigger with an extension.
Dr Brown Bear suggests Peppa and George have their hearing checked. The audiologist discovers George has a moderate hearing loss in one ear and suggests George tries a hearing aid.
Join Tim Rex as he tackles kid-shaped problems with dino-sized solutions... in space! Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone.
Stan, Grace and Brody form a band, but a mystery drummer joins in somewhere across town. Stan and Gran go on a hunt for their invisible bandmate!
Winnie Winnington's cow competitor Mooo-na Lisa and Bettina run away disguised as superheroes at the Super Farm Fair. PAW Patrol must save the day before the Super Animal Contest.
House of Stevies new fashion collection needs a fabulous centrepiece for her runway show. But it's up to Milo, Lofty and Lark to design, make and model their creations.
Holly is left in charge when King and Queen Thistle go away on important business. But ruling the Little Kingdom is not as easy as it looks...
Peppa has enjoyed her very first holiday abroad, but it is now time to go home. She can't wait to see Suzy and Goldie again.
When Doodle becomes embarrassed, she develops a cringe (she calls it a 'whoops') that spreads through camp.
Olivia finds out how things work with fun experiments you can try at home. Today, she learns all about reactions - from brushing her teeth to making a really big fizz! (Ep1)
Join Derek for a story about the different ways children all over the world travel to school. Some take the bus, some by canoe, through valleys, and over mountains and snow!

Two of 5's much-loved faces team up to focus on the issues that matter most to viewers - with your opinions front and centre.
National and international news.
Matt looks at the big news stories developing during the day and offers help and advice to save you money and make your lives a little easier.
Raw, unfiltered, authentic and personal, Vanessa Feltz wants you to tell her what's on your mind. Fiery discussions, a good giggle and plenty of afternoon gossip!
When a rock band reunion ends in murder, Jack and Kate are thrust into a case riddled with secrets and a meticulously-planned alibi, before unveiling a killer hiding in plain sight.
Singer Gaynor gets ready for a big comeback gig as a country music act but she's under pressure with her vocal chords and warming up for her partner's Oasis tribute act.
Join Dan Walker and the team for the news that matters to you.
Aged six, Benji decided to turn the family garden into a nature reserve complete with a pond made out of the washing up bowl. He's now raised thousands of pounds for nature charities.
Back on the road, Susan's finds doe-eyed Jersey cows and is knee deep in spuds. And in Guernsey she fires the noon day canon, alongside spectacular beaches and stunning scenery.
Jeremy Vine hosts as team captains Carol Vorderman and Sally Lindsay battle it out, joined by former Olympic athlete Colin Jackson and Coronation Street actor Colson Smith.

programmes.show_name: New: Motorway Cops: Catching Britain's Speeders
programmes.show_description: A member of the public reports a car crash with two occupants and a driver who stinks of booze. And a white transit van attempts to ram a police car off the road.
...Taking Down the Shoplifting Gangs. Police piece together incriminating clips to tackle suspects linked to a crime group. In Burnley, cops pursue prolific shoplifting suspects.
Access-all-areas documentary following police at work in real time. A father calls 999 with concerns for the wellbeing of his missing son.
Officers pull over a high-performance vehicle after reports of the driver live streaming at speeds of over 170 miles an hour. And a driver crashes into a lorry after drinking heavily.
Charlie and Paul pursue a driver that stole fuel, and Chris and Sophie spot a bunny-hopping learner driver who already has eight points on his provisional license.

...Fighting Champion. Monica's boyfriend is determined to continue with his dangerous sport. Chandler's boss is over-friendly.

Pigeonton has nested in a lamppost outside Mr Gruber's shop, but the council has condemned it, so Paddington decides to find him a new home. (VS)

programmes.show_name: **Visually Signed** Ben and Holly's Little Kingdom
programmes.show_description: Nanny takes Ben and Holly to visit a witch in the forest. When Nanny is rude to the witch, she gets frozen by magic. (VS)
The Toy Cupboard: Peppa and George's toy basket is full, so Mummy Pig decides it is time to order a new toy cupboard.
School Camp: Peppa and her friends go camping with their teacher. After pitching their tents and collecting sticks, they all sing a song around the campfire.
Fluff climbs into a wellington boot looking for his beloved Whizzy Button but can't get back out again! Tweedy to the rescue!
Scratch shares her love of building blocks with Magnus and Squiggle. Squiggle realises sometimes fun isn't just about building towers, but also about when they come toppling down!
...Big Adventures! Thomas travels with Shane into the centre of Australia's hot red desert, but Shane doesn't to stop to refuel.
When James and Sarah compete for the title of 'best steam driver,' James accidentally spills a burning coal into a pile of wood, sparking a fire.
Captain Daddy Pig: Peppa and her family borrow Grandpa Pig's boat and head out for a day on the river. All is going well until the boat gets stuck in some long reeds!
There's a heatwave in Windsor Gardens. As Mateo has sold out of ice creams he creates a delicious new flavour with Paddington.
When Posy shows Pip her tune on the ukulele, he has a go and finds it easy, even adding some notes. Posy is jealous, but Pip explains it's all because of her excellent teaching.
Mayor Goodway dreams she's travelled to the mysterious Cluck-Cluck Island-a very strange land where Chickaletta is royalty.
...Stage. When Speed Meister sabotages the stage for the town Talent Show, the pups use Motor's talent to save the show.
Mr Bull arrives with his team to start work on Peppa's house renovation. Peppa and family move into the caravan in the garden while the work is being completed. It's a bit of a squeeze!
Peppa is excited to help George explore the world of sounds now he has his new hearing aid. She shows him her favourite sounds including the splashing of jumping in a muddy puddle!
Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever.
Strange holes in garden fences are popping up all over Porthole and Stink has gone missing! Stan and Gran spy a mystery and decide to investigate...
Zuma and Hurricane Harrigan are about to go kitesurfing when a mighty wind sweeps them off the beach. It;s up to the PAW Patrol to find the stranded pals and rescue them.
When Milo, Lofty and Lark take care of Horatio's dentist surgery, they love making sure no one leaves without a dazzling smile!
Nanny Plum has a special secret that Ben and Holly are surprised to discover when they see her going out during the night to collect the teeth of children.
George enjoys seeing his reflection in the mirror so much that he and Peppa try to find other shiny things to see themselves in.
Leonardo is convinced that Odo saved his life and sticks to Odo like glue causing Odo a lot of trouble.
Olivia discovers why things float or sink, learning about density and liquids. (Ep2)
Kiera reads a beautifully illustrated and interactive book that makes learning numbers fun for little ones, while they keep an eye out for diving and skateboarding chicks!

We meet the Chief Executive of Moor Trees as well as volunteers who help restore trees to ensure Dartmoor becomes a stronger and more resilient landscape in the future.
In historic Nottinghamshire, Susan hears tales of superheroes, flexes her fingers at archery, explores mysterious caves, and walks in the footsteps of ice skaters Torvill and Dean.
Jeremy Vine presides over a masterclass in puzzle solving, led by captains Carol Vorderman and Sally Lindsay. Their guests are impressionist Jon Culshaw and comedian Stephen Bailey.
Can Peter Wright put a spaniel who's been hit by a car on the road to recovery? Matt Smith discovers ten eggs when he x-rays a giant tortoise. Shona Searson tends to a pedigree cow.
Sharon D Clarke returns as DCI Ellis. When the leader of a prison reform campaign is found murdered in his small village, a tangled picture of old grudges quickly emerges.

programmes.show_name: Fare Dodgers: At War with the Law
programmes.show_description: Behind the scenes with specialist revenue protection teams at some of the UK's biggest rail operators as we follow their battles with suspected fare evaders on the network.
